---
name: Framework or industry pack request
about: Request a new framework pack or industry pack
title: "pack: <framework-or-industry>"
labels: pack
---

**Type:** framework | industry

**Name:** <e.g. Ionic, .NET MAUI, Education, Fitness>

**Why it matters / demand:** <who needs it>

**Framework specifics (if framework):** tokens/theming API · safe-area primitive · idiomatic
sheet · a11y API · animation primitive · adaptive support.

**Domain specifics (if industry):** the 5 most load-bearing UX concerns; any compliance
considerations (e.g. HIPAA-adjacent, PCI).

**Willing to contribute it?** <yes/no>
